beauty_bookings.hero_title: Track your booking requests and notes all in one place.
beauty_bookings.hero_text: Your most recent bookings appear first. Quickly filter between active and completed bookings.
beauty_bookings.login_title: Sign in to view your booking history.
beauty_bookings.login_text: Once logged in, you can see all your beauty booking requests and staff notes in one place.
beauty_bookings.status_desc_change_requested: A change to your schedule or service is being requested.
beauty_bookings.empty: No beauty bookings yet. Once you complete a booking, it will appear here.
beauty_bookings.select_prompt: Select a booking to view its details.
beauty_bookings.change_request_hint: Our team is reviewing your request. Please wait a moment.
beauty_bookings.alt_offer_desc: Your requested time is no longer available. The salon has suggested the options below — please select one.
beauty_bookings.alt_offer_accepted_result: You have already accepted this offer.
beauty_bookings.alt_offer_rejected_result: You have already declined this offer.
beauty_bookings.alt_response_accepted: Offer accepted. Your booking schedule has been updated.
beauty_bookings.alt_slot_select_error: Please select one of the offered slots.
beauty_bookings.manage_desc: You can cancel directly when the booking is pending or confirmed. This cannot be undone.
beauty_bookings.manage_disabled: This booking cannot be managed at its current status.
beauty_bookings.cancel_details_placeholder: Any additional reason you'd like to share?
beauty_bookings.change_placeholder: e.g. I'd like to change to March 20 at 2pm. / I'd like to change my service.
beauty_bookings.change_success: Your change request has been sent.
beauty_bookings.error_load_401: Sign in to view your bookings.
beauty_bookings.error_cancel_400: This booking cannot be canceled right now.
beauty_bookings.error_cancel_403: You can only cancel your own bookings.
beauty_bookings.error_cancel: Could not cancel your booking. Please try again later.
beauty_bookings.error_cancel_reason: Please select or enter a cancellation reason.
beauty_bookings.error_change_reason: Please enter what you'd like to change.
beauty_bookings.error_change: Could not send your change request. Please try again later.
beauty_bookings.error_alt: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.hero_desc: Choose how you want to receive updates for Kello's premium concierge services.

channel.title: Channels
channel.email_desc: We'll safely send core updates about your booking information and progress via email.
channel.app_desc: Important booking status changes are always recorded in the app notification box, so you can check them anytime.

types.title: Update Types
types.booking_desc: Receive notifications at key stages of service such as request, confirmation, and completion.
types.change_desc: We will immediately notify you of the approval or rejection of your requested date/item changes.
types.alternative_desc: We will notify you when a salon suggests an alternative time due to your preferred time being fully booked.

notifications.footer_note: Essential booking-related notices may be sent regardless of your settings.
